name: analysing-heap-dumps
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for Analysing Heap Dumps by John Neerdael

plugins.name: analysing-heap-dumps
plugins.description: Investigate .hprof files (Android or JVM heap dumps), deobfuscate Android release heaps with R8 mappings, diagnose memory leaks, find holders, measure GC churn, or chase OutOfMemoryError. Wraps heaptrail with auto-install instructions.
